title: Policy
description: A governance rule applied by the control plane. Policies are themselves canonical objects (object_type: 'policy') and are therefore immutable and content-addressed.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Must be '0.1.0' for this version of the spec.

id.description: Unique identifier for this policy. UUID v4.

policy_type.description: Category of governance this policy enforces.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what this policy does and why.

active.description: Whether this policy is currently enforced by the control plane.

applies_to.description: Scope of objects or agents this policy governs. Omit to apply globally.

object_types.description: Object types this policy applies to.

agent_ids.description: Specific agent IDs this policy applies to.

rules.description: Ordered list of rules enforced by this policy. Rules are evaluated in order; first match wins.

rule_id.description: Short identifier for this rule within the policy (e.g. 'no-overwrite', 'require-context').

action.description: What the control plane does when this rule matches.

condition.description: Human-readable condition that triggers this rule. Formal expression language is TBD.

parameters.description: Optional parameters for the rule action (e.g. retention duration for 'expire').

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this policy was created.

created_by.description: Identifier of the human or agent who created this policy.
